notes:
Ling JANGTQ + MiniMax JANGTQ_K production-ready + DSV4 cache hardening + Gemma 4 31B CRACK fix.

16 fixes documented at docs/DSV4_FIX_NUANCES.md + docs/CODEX_2026_05_05_FIXES.md.

DSV4 cache stack:
- N-1 prompt-boundary snapshot via two-phase prefill (real fix, not just a guard) → paged + L2 disk cache hit verified, restart-survival verified
- SWA+CSA+HSA cache truncation guard (defensive backstop) at scheduler.py:1964 + symmetric guard at 4029 (gen_prompt_len strip)
- DSV4 partial-MLA TQ KV q4 default — composite-aware: SWA quantizes, CSA/HSA pool buffers stay native
- Schema bump: PAGED_CACHE_SCHEMA_VERSION=v3, dsv4_cache_schema=v7

API + reasoning correctness:
- Force enable_thinking=True on chat/Ollama/Responses (chat-mode bundle is training-data-contaminated). VMLX_DSV4_ALLOW_CHAT=1 to opt out.
- DSV4 reasoning_effort passthrough: 'low'/'medium'/'high' now reach encoder as 'high' (was stripped → encoder defaulted to plain-thinking with no budget). Fixed VC-prompt loop on the panel Reasoning button.
- Responses API: cache_salt + skip_prefix_cache fields added (were silently dropped).
- thinking_mode='high' no longer aliases 'max'.

Sampling defenses:
- DSV4 + MiniMax-M2 rep_penalty 1.15 family floor with MIN-floor enforcement (overrides bundle/CLI defaults below 1.15)
- DSV4 single-shot prefill default (revert v1.5.15 chunking regression)
- DSV4 hard n-gram dedup (1+2+3-gram + diversity-collapse detector, generated-tokens-only — prompt-poison protected)
- DSV4 cache snapshot bf16 round-trip safety (fp32 staging, hard-fail on copy errors)

Non-DSV4:
- Ling-2.6 bailing_hybrid model class (panel/scripts/patches) + flat-2D switch_mlp shape repair for MXFP4 bundles
- MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ_K (mixed-bit gate=2/up=2/down=4) via jang 2.5.25 dp_bits threading
- Gemma-4-31B-JANG_4M-CRACK shape-mismatch fix: HF/MLX dual-naming in quant_shape_inference (HF discussion #25)
- All 16 local bundles detected correctly: Qwen dense + Qwen MoE + Ling JANGTQ + Ling MXFP4 + Nemotron-Omni (3 variants) + Laguna + Kimi + DSV4 + Gemma 4 + MiniMax (3 variants)

Live-tested matrix on 6 working models: 12/12 single+multi-turn coherency.

DSV4 long-context drift (384+ token prompts) is a known bundle-quality issue per /Users/eric/jang/codex_dsv4_fixkit/docs/JANGTQ2_RECOVERY.md. Fix path is V3 mixed-bit converter rebuild via codex_dsv4_fixkit, in flight separately.

Schema bump invalidates ALL families' L2 disk cache; clean rebuild on next run.
